title: Khaitan, C&M advise JSW Steel on JV with South Korea-based POSCO Group
description: JSW Steel Limited has formed a joint venture with the South Korea-based POSCO Group.The transaction involves the issuance of shares of Saffron Resources Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of JSW Steel, to POSCO-India Private Limited and POSCO Co., Ltd (entities part of the POSCO Group), pursuant to which such subsidiary would become a 50:50 joint venture between JSW Steel and the POSCO Group for a total consideration of $110.72 million ($ 55.36 million for 50%).Khaitan & Co advised J
